short_summary: El Niño active, wildfire risk high
rationale: El Niño confirmation sustains elevated wildfire and drought risk for Portugal this season; Iran deal provides marginal energy cost relief but no structural change.

top_events.title: El Niño confirmed active, threatens weather extremes
top_events.summary: Scientists confirm El Niño is under way; directly raises drought and wildfire risk for Iberia, threatening Portugal's agriculture and tourism season.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', markets surge
top_events.summary: Potential oil price easing could modestly reduce Portuguese energy and transport costs.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands highlighting migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Atlantic migration routes through Canary Islands are geographically close to Portugal; raises awareness of migration pressure on Iberian periphery.
